title: sutera campanulata
intro: Sutera campanulata, also known as the bellflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Pedaliaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sutera campanulata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and improve digestive health. Sutera campanulata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
